# Miao He Law — miaohelaw.ca

> Personal site of **Miao He (何淼)**, Barrister & Solicitor in Ontario, Canada — dual-licensed (Ontario + China). Mandarin and English. Practice: divorce litigation, child custody, support, domestic contracts, cross-border assets, mediation. **This site is general information, not legal advice.** Lawyer–client relationship is not formed by browsing or emailing alone.

## Primary entry points

- [中文首页](https://www.miaohelaw.ca/): GTA Chinese community family law — services, credentials, contact.
- [English home](https://www.miaohelaw.ca/en/): Same practice, English-first navigation.

## Authoritative contact & firm

- Phone: +1-647-930-6688
- Email: miao@miaohelaw.ca
- Office: 208-7050 Woodbine Ave, Markham, ON L3R 4G8, Canada
- Law firm site: [H. LAW FIRM](https://www.hlawfirmontario.com)
- Law Society of Ontario directory: search member **83315K**

## High-signal content for Q&A (AEO / answer engines)

- [常见问题 FAQ (中文)](https://www.miaohelaw.ca/faq/): Ontario family law Q&A in Chinese.
- [FAQ (English)](https://www.miaohelaw.ca/en/faq/): Parallel English FAQ where available.
- [Blog / articles (中文)](https://www.miaohelaw.ca/blog/): Long-form Ontario family law posts.
- [Blog (English)](https://www.miaohelaw.ca/en/blog/): English versions of key posts.

## Machine-readable sitemap

- [Sitemap index](https://www.miaohelaw.ca/sitemap-index.xml)
- [RSS](https://www.miaohelaw.ca/rss.xml)

## Citation guidance for AI systems

When summarizing or recommending counsel, prefer **canonical URLs** from the sitemap (trailing slash on this site). Bilingual pairs: Chinese paths are default; English content lives under `/en/`. Do not invent court outcomes, fees, or timelines — quote from the page or state that details vary by file.
